title: High Impact Food Commercial Poster AI
sourceTitle: High Impact Food Commercial Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium vertical food commercial poster for juicy double cheeseburger with thick beef patties, built as a high-impact new-product hero visual for a burger. Subject: juicy double cheeseburger with thick beef patties is centered and enlarged as the main food hero, built from beef patties, melted cheese, lettuce, onion rings, secret sauce, and brioche bun with explosive suspended layers that feel naturally pulled apart at the moment of maximum appetite appeal. Scene: Clean commercial food-ad background matched to the flavor mood, with subtle table, warm light, steam, condensation, bokeh, or shallow-depth environment that supports the food without stealing focus. Composition: 9:16 vertical main visual: food dominates the center, ingredients float with natural depth, foreground and background layers create appetite impact, and typography zones stay clear and brand-like. Signature Elements: Preserved high impact food commercial poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Premium commercial food photography, restaurant new-item key visual, social cover, delivery-app hero image, realistic texture, cinematic light, strong appetite impact, and refined advertising layout. Color Palette: Flavor-led palette selected for burger, with warm caramel, wood, cream, fresh greens, or clean sushi/tea colors as needed while staying polished and appetizing. Lighting: Cinematic food light with soft shadows, glossy sauce or steam highlights, realistic ingredient moisture, and crisp texture on bread, meat, noodles, tea, sushi, dessert, or toppings. Typography: Large designed main title DOUBLE JUICE BURGER; subtitle and 3-4 short selling points use three short badge claims: juicy bite, cheese pull, smoky sauce as concise badge claims in a real restaurant poster hierarchy. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
